content:
# Session 2 (iter-002) ‚Äî recommendations for the next plan iter

## TOP ‚Äî 1-to-1 coverage debt (4 new unmatched Lean decls; planner authors prose)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 141 (was 137; +4 from this iter's helpers, all in cone now).
Author blueprint blocks (`\label`/`\lean`/`\uses`) for these ‚Äî review marks them later:
1. `AlgebraicGeometry.finite_order_support_affine` (WeilDivisor ~L787) ‚Äî affine `Spec`
   ring core; **carries the residual sorry**. `\uses`: `Ideal.finite_minimalPrimes_of_isNoetherianRing`
   + (pending) affine stalk=localization/`ordFrac`=adic-valuation bridge. Place near
   `lem:rationalMap_order_finite_support` in `RiemannRoch_WeilDivisor.tex`.
2. `AlgebraicGeometry.finite_order_support_on_affineOpen` (WeilDivisor ~L816) ‚Äî sorry-free
   open-chart reduction. `\uses`: `finite_order_support_affine`, `PrimeDivisor.{ofOpen,
   restrictToOpen, order_eq_order_restrict, ext}`, `Opens.functionFieldIso`.
3. `AlgebraicGeometry.instCompactSpaceLeftOfIsProper` (WeilDivisor) ‚Äî 1-line instance,
   `\uses{QuasiCompact.compactSpace_of_compactSpace}`; candidate `\mathlibok`-anchor sibling.
4. `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule_linearEquiv_of_iso` (RRFormula ~L673) ‚Äî sheaf-iso ‚áí
   degree-wise HModule linear-equiv; sibling of `lem:euler_char_iso`. `\uses`:
   `Abelian.Ext.postcompOfLinear`, `comp_assoc_of_third_deg_zero`, `mk‚ÇÄ_comp_mk‚ÇÄ`.

## Closest-to-completion / ready frontier
- `dag-query gaps` = **0** (every blueprint statement has an informal proof). `dag-query frontier`
  is the live ready set. No ‚àû-holes to fill.
- **No new proof-fill frontier opened by this iter** ‚Äî the œá-chain residuals are all deep
  substrate (below). Next genuine prover-fillable work depends on those substrate lanes landing.

## Deep substrate lanes (mathlib-build / scaffold ‚Äî NOT inline proof-fill)
Assign in `mathlib-build` mode with a fresh gate verdict; do NOT hand to a normal prove lane.
- **WeilDivisor affine bridge** (closes `finite_order_support_affine`): build `isoSpec`-naturality
  of `order` + `O_{V,Z.point} = Localization.AtPrime R p` + `ordFrac = p`-adic valuation. ~150‚Äì300 LOC.
- **S1 dim-1-regular ‚áí DVR** (OcOfD `sheafOf` DVR instance): Mathlib `b80f227` LACKS
  `IsRegularLocalRing.isDiscreteValuationRing`; build project-side (Stacks 00PD). Plan flagged ~90‚Äì200 LOC.
- **S2 Serre coherent-cohomology finiteness** (closes 4 `eulerCharacteristic_sheafOf_succ` sorries):
  needs a subphase DECISION first (general Serre III.5.2 vs subsheaf-of-K_C route); blueprint
  chapter NOT yet written. Author the S2 chapter this iter so the lane is parallelizable.
- **S3 `hvan` Grothendieck H¬≤-vanishing** (single `eulerCharacteristic_shortExact_add` sorry):
  `Subsingleton (Abelian.Ext L S.X‚ÇÅ 2)` on a 1-dim scheme. No Mathlib support. Blueprint chapter owed.
- **S5 `injective_flasque` / `j_!`** (H1Vanishing): extension-by-zero absent in `b80f227`.
  Headline no longer depends on it ‚Äî LOW priority; only needed for the *general* flasque induction.

## Do-NOT-retry (blocked; structural change required first)
- `finite_order_support_affine` inline: 3 consecutive isolations now (iter-001 finite-support ‚Üí
  iter-002 affine-chart ‚Üí affine-Spec core). Further inline attempts will churn ‚Äî the next move is
  the affine-bridge substrate above, not another decomposition.
- S2/S3 typed sorries: do NOT assign as prove targets until their substrate chapters exist.

## Lean-side docstring hygiene (route to a prove/refactor lane; review can't edit .lean)
Stale module/decl docstrings contradicting now-true code (auditor + lvb both flagged):
- `H1Vanishing.lean` headline docstring L1409‚Äì1417 ‚Äî still credits the sorry-carrying
  `HModule_flasque_eq_zero` + "typed-sorry" status; the headline is now axiom-clean via
  `HModule_flasque_one_eq_zero`. Update.
- `H1Vanishing.lean` L271‚Äì273 ‚Äî `constant_of_irreducible` docstring says "Tier-3 typed sorry;
  closure iter-192+" but the body is fully proved. Update.
- (2 more stale docstrings per `logs/iter-002/lean-auditor-iter002-report.md`.)

## Minor
- Auditor minor: `degree_positivePart_principal_eq_finrank` has an un-synthesizable `[‚Ä¶]` binder ‚Äî
  make explicit or back with an instance. Repetitive cast pattern in
  `one_le_degree_positivePart_principal_of_order_one` (golf, optional).
- 3 minor blueprint tightenings on `lem:euler_char_shortExact_add` (hypothesis-count
  reconciliation; note the discharged sixth finiteness; surface `_hH1` premise) ‚Äî see
  `logs/iter-002/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-rrformula-report.md`.

## Reusable pattern discovered (also in KB)
When `Module.Finite.equiv`/`.finiteDimensional` transport across a project `LinearEquiv` fails
at typeclass *synthesis* (own `HasSheafify`/`HasExt` binders not key-matching the ambient
instance; deterministic heartbeat timeout) even though types are defeq ‚Äî transport at the
**`finrank` level** instead: `LinearEquiv.finrank_eq` + `FiniteDimensional.of_finrank_eq_succ`.
`exact`/`rw` match up to defeq where synthesis does not.
